Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
title: Comparison of the 13C(d,alpha)11B and 11B(3He,p)13C reactions.

x4codes.hlp: University of Rochester, Rochester, NY, United States of America

x4freetext: Natural boron (81.3% 11B) was evaporated from a
tungsten filament and deposited on a 3-mil-thick
carbon targets of about 0.2 mg/cm2 were prepared by
cracking methyl iodide with a carbon content enriched

x4codes.hlp: University of Rochester, Rochester, NY, United States of America

x4freetext: The protons were detected by a thin sodium-
iodide crystal mounted on a photomultiplier tube which
could be swung through an angular range of 0 to 160
degrees relative to be incident beam. A similar
detector was placed at -140 degrees as a monitor.
